basics.name: Amir Mazaheri
basics.label: Computer Vision Researcher & Engineer
basics.summary: Computer vision researcher and engineer working at the intersection of visual perception and language — video understanding, visual question answering, and vision–language models. This file is a placeholder and will be updated with the latest CV content.

work.name: Center for Research in Computer Vision (CRCV), University of Central Florida
work.summary: Ph.D. research with Dr. Mubarak Shah on Visual Question Answering, Visual Text Correction, video prediction, and video retrieval.

publications.name: Visual Text Correction
publications.summary: Introduces the Visual Text Correction task: detect and correct inaccuracies in a video's textual description.

publications.name: Video Fill In the Blank using LR/RL LSTMs with Spatial-Temporal Attentions
publications.summary: Bidirectional LSTMs with spatial-temporal attention for video fill-in-the-blank.

publications.name: Learning a Multi-concept Video Retrieval Model with Multiple Latent Variables
publications.summary: Latent-variable model for multi-concept video retrieval.
